---
title: "Blog"
toc: false
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
page-layout: full
---

Occasional writing on research ideas, methods, and academic life. Posts range from accessible essays to technical notes with code.
